title: MCP Conformance Test Suite
description: Schemas for validating MCP server implementations against the specification through structured test cases and conformance reports.

TestCase.title: Test Case
TestCase.description: A single conformance test that validates a specific aspect of an MCP server implementation.

test_id.description: Unique identifier for the test case.

proposal_ref.description: Reference to the proposal being tested.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this test validates.

category.description: The area of MCP functionality being tested.

input.description: The input payload to send to the server under test.

expected_output.description: The expected output used to evaluate the server response.

assertion_type.description: How the actual output should be compared against the expected output.

TestSuiteMetadata.title: Test Suite Metadata
TestSuiteMetadata.description: Metadata describing the conformance test suite.

suite_version.description: Version of the conformance test suite.

mcp_spec_version.description: Version of the MCP specification being tested against.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the test suite was created.

total_tests.description: Total number of test cases in the suite.

ConformanceReport.title: Conformance Report
ConformanceReport.description: A report summarizing the results of running the conformance test suite against an MCP server.

server_name.description: Name of the MCP server that was tested.

server_version.description: Version of the MCP server that was tested.

suite_version.description: Version of the conformance test suite that was run.

tested_at.description: Timestamp when the test suite was executed.

results.description: Individual results for each test case.

TestResult.title: Test Result
TestResult.description: The outcome of a single test case execution.

test_id.description: Identifier of the test case that was executed.

message.description: Additional detail about the test outcome, especially on failure or error.

duration_ms.description: Time in milliseconds the test took to execute.
